description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the php:5.6 Docker image and defines two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a build job (tagged docker, only on master) that runs the global before_script `set -xe` and `apt-get update -yqq`, then installs zip and unzip, installs Composer via `curl -sS https://getcomposer.org/installer | php -- --install-dir=/usr/local/bin --filename=composer`, runs `composer install`, copies `src/` to `dist/` and copies `vendor/` to `dist/version-1/php/vendor/`, caches the `vendor` directory, and publishes the `dist/` directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a deploy job (tagged docker, only on master) that depends on the build job, runs the same before_script, installs lftp, creates `~/.lftp/rc` with `set ssl:verify-certificate no`, and executes `lftp -e "mirror --no-perms --exclude-glob .git* --exclude .git/ -R dist/ htdocs/" -u unaux_27147990,$PROFREEHOST_FTP_PASSWORD ftpupload.net` to upload the built files via FTP.
